name: The Lara unit
description: Elevate your look effortlessly with the Wavy Bouncy Human hair crafted from 100% premium human hair for softness, volume, and natural movement. This beautifully constructed wig features a gorgeous wavy texture that stays full, bouncy, and lightweight—perfect for everyday wear or special occasions. Designed for comfort and realism, the wig offers a natural-looking hairline, secure fit, and a luxurious, silky finish that mimics the look and feel of real, healthy hair. Enjoy stunning waves with minimal effort and maximum versatility. Features 100% Human Hair – soft, natural, and long-lasting Wavy & Bouncy Texture – full of body with beautiful movement Pre-Made Wig Construction – easy to wear and style Natural Hairline – realistic finish for seamless blending Lightweight & Breathable Cap – comfortable for all-day wear Heat-Style Friendly – curl or restyle as desired Minimal Shedding & Tangle-Free – high-quality craftsmanship Can Be Washed & Reused – maintains its beauty after multiple wears

name: The Bomb 6x5 glueless Wig
description: Our Water curls are premium luxury hair that is designed for the bold, the beautiful, and those who settle for nothing less than flawless. Crafted from 100% premium virgin human hair, this hair offers maximum thickness, incredible volume, and natural luster that radiates elegance. The super double drawn quality ensures that over 90% of the hairs are the same length, giving you that full, rich look without thinning ends Water Curl Texture – Soft, juicy curls that are easy to manage, hold their shape beautifully, and bounce with every move. Perfect for that wet-and-wavy look that never goes out of style. The 6x5 Lace Closure – Offers a realistic scalp look with a generous parting space, blending seamlessly into your natural hairline for a flawless melt. Why You’ll Love It: Super full, luxurious, and soft to the touch Perfect for glam, everyday wear, or special occasions Can be colored, straightened, or styled to your desire Durable lace with minimal maintenance required Treat yourself to the ultimate in hair excellence. name: The Lavender Luxe wig
description: Turn heads effortlessly with the Shara Hair Premium Virgin Hair Full Frontal Body Wave Wig — the perfect combination of luxury, softness, and flawless versatility. Made from 100% premium virgin hair, this unit delivers exceptional silkiness, durability, and a beautiful natural flow that moves just like your own. The gorgeous ash-blonde shade adds a cool, modern radiance that flatters every complexion — ideal for elevating your everyday style or creating a striking look for any occasion. Featuring a full frontal lace design, this wig offers a seamless hairline from ear to ear, blending smoothly into your skin for an ultra-natural, scalp-like finish. The breathable cap and secure construction provide comfort and confidence, while the body wave texture gives you effortless volume, bounce, and styling flexibility. ✔️ Premium virgin hair — soft, full, and luxuriously smooth ✔️ Full frontal lace — realistic hairline, versatile parting, and beginner-friendly ✔️ Ash-blonde tone — chic, cool-toned, and universally flattering ✔️ Body wave texture — voluminous, glamorous, and easy to style Whether you're aiming for soft glam, everyday confidence, or a fresh new vibe, this ash-blonde body wave wig from Shara Hair delivers beauty and boldness with every wear. name: The platinum whisper bob wig
description: Elevate your look with the luxurious shine and sophistication of our 14” Platinum Bob . Crafted with a 6x5 Premium Virgin Hair lace top, this unit delivers unmatched quality, realism, and styling versatility. The soft, silky strands offer a flawless platinum tone that’s vibrant, dimensional, and beautifully cool-toned without brassiness. Designed for effortless wear, this bob features: ✨ Premium Virgin Hair – Pure, cuticle-aligned strands that are long-lasting, tangle-free, and ultra-soft. ✨ 6x5 Lace Area – A spacious, breathable lace top that creates natural parting options and a scalp-realistic finish. ✨ 14-Inch Blunt Bob Cut – Chic, modern, and universally flattering with a sleek flow and sharp movement. ✨ Pre-Plucked & Natural Hairline – No customization needed for a seamless melt. ✨ Heat & Style Friendly – Curl it, straighten it, or add waves while maintaining a smooth platinum glow. Perfect for everyday glam or a bold style switch, this platinum bob brings premium luxury and a stunning high-fashion look straight out of the box. Hair Type: Premium virgin hair Length: 14” Lace Type: 6x5 Construction: Factory made

name: The Hazel wig
description: Elevate your look with our 24-inch 6×5 Brown Body-Wave Premium Virgin Hair Wig .Crafted for those who value luxury, longevity, and effortless beauty. This factory-made masterpiece features 100% virgin human hair, offering unmatched softness, natural movement, and a silky body-wave texture that holds beautifully with or without heat styling. The 6×5 upgraded lace area provides a more realistic scalp appearance, increased parting versatility, and a seamless melt into any skin tone. Its rich chocolate-brown hue adds dimension and warmth, giving you a naturally radiant finish. Engineered for comfort, the wig includes an adjustable cap, secure combs, and a breathable construction ideal for all-day wear. Whether you’re going for everyday elegance or a glamorous transformation, this premium Arabella unit delivers stunning results with zero fuss.
